data.body: Agent 3 (Code Tracer) RESULT: Confirmed same root cause. CRITICAL TEST BUG FOUND: tests/plugin/test_skill_allowed_tools.py asserts 'allowed-tools' in frontmatter_keys (key presence only) — comment says 'empty value is acceptable' which is WRONG. Test passes green while plugin shows 3 skills. Fix: remove allowed-tools: from 29 SKILL.md files (or set non-empty value), AND fix the test assertion to check non-null value. Agent 482e-7e61 (subagent_type): working as designed per CLAUDE.md — inline fallback is the intended path.
